{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323165934DADCBC2E9B803003E815"}"},"total":642},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7292770926323041075","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"好看，真的很好看！！！快七年的书虫了，之前也有看过完结的 比较留念、但这还真是我唯一一本，真实感觉里面的主角，是真实存在的！从开始陪伴的结尾…看到一半的时候突然意识到了，原来那不是真实的人！我竟然把主角看成了一个活生生的人，就像是这个主角就是作者，然后作者把自己的亲身经历了写进去，说真的…这本书真的不像是脑洞玄幻， 我当时意识到的那一刻，真的特别震惊！毕竟我看小说也快七年了！真的从来没有这种感觉，隔一段时间换一种类型的书，从来没有把一个纸片人，这是我第一次…潜意识里认为他是一个真人……挺震惊的。。。真的特别代入…只能说……作者写的真好！！！[顶帖][顶帖][顶帖]在完结的那一刻…说实话…不舍肯定是有那么一点，但作者的结尾真的很合适这本书，看完之后让我感觉就是主角…就应该有这样的一个结尾。。而且这个结尾写出来连带着整本书…都变的像是很梦幻的一场梦！
【玛德！老子写作文都没那么认真过！从没写这么多个字！[尬笑]绝了，感触挺深的……这可能是我有史以来，最有文凭的一次[撇嘴]】"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1697981364,"group_id":"7237092466350885947","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"试着做一个作者……","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N8e7bs5Z2g0X2uXueSY2okdxX30TtMZ6qW1G/g9u9uX4","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/f5247be6d1384427bce7dfe129643406~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776792200&x-signature=wEGc2EZFGkIYCg8eX3ApyOI7UwA%3D","user_id":"3897142434337207","user_name":"榈磐"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3897142434337207","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1697289734,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFE1DD","can_worn":false,"id":1,"name":"吃瓜群众","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/99d8abedb53eea031f973b1251119d85","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/eaf916cdd4f4860ea2a74b0d0e3718f1"}},"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7237092466350885947","book_info":{"abstract":"孙宇重生到西游记世界，于补天石中率先醒来，成为孙悟空的大哥。
融混世四猴血脉，成就混沌魔猿血脉。
融三清祖巫血脉，成就盘古血脉。
……
多年之后，孙宇站在洪荒的巅峰。
佛门想要大兴我不管，但拿我弟弟当棋子就是不可以，佛门注定灭亡，就算是天算计的也不可以，天都给你掀了。
我弟弟永远是齐天大圣孙悟空，不是斗战胜佛。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o7d6aad2e94845c637cbf586ab2af0059~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"梦棠花下语","author_id":"","book_id":"7237092466350885947","book_name":"西游：开局灵明石猴，孙悟空他哥","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#384048","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1.6万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":257,"name":"玄幻脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=257&name=玄幻脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":7,"name":"玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7&name=玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":373,"name":"西游衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=373&name=西游衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":384,"name":"无敌","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=384&name=无敌&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":452,"name":"架空","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=452&name=架空&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7238380974755709500","read_count":"15779","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"354573"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.1","serial_count":"166","tags":"玄幻脑洞,玄幻,系统,穿越,西游衍生,无敌,架空","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/639f5d397b01ef3393c6b119680c6a4a~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779440374&x-signature=DQ4oK0RQVOUlP5kzwztmh%2FVzJM8%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"3769545592939501","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"2.2833354e+07"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323165934DADCBC2E9B803003
